title: 2026-02-17 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 17.79
description: New daily signal for 2026-02-17: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 17.79/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The index is designed to approximate how market stress can build pressure for a softer policy posture. On 2026-02-17, the score printed 17.79/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
